title: System and method of an explanation tool for automotive production planning
abstract: A system and method are disclosed including a production planner that receives a sales forecast for configurations of an automobile. The production planner also receives constraints associated with an automobile supply chain. The production planner further models configurations and constraints as a production planning problem, solves a production plan for automobiles, and displays an automobile production solution of the production planning problem.
claims: 1. A computer-implemented method, comprising: modeling a production planning problem for two or more configurations of an automobile, the two or more configurations comprising one or more options, wherein the production planning problem is modelled as a linear program; representing the two or more configurations of the automobile as two or more predefined vehicles, the two or more predefined vehicles comprising one or more active option constraints associated with the one or more options, wherein each predefined vehicle of the two or more predefined vehicles is represented by a set of 1's or 0's indicating one or more associated active option constraints; displaying on a graphical user interface, by a computer comprising a processor and a memory, an automobile production solution of the production planning problem; and in response to hovering a mouse over a portion of the graphical user interface, displaying an explanation tool window overlaid, at least in part, over the automobile production solution, wherein the explanation tool window comprises an explanation of the automobile production solution provided by the computer, wherein the explanation further comprises a plant production capacity table and further wherein one or more entries in the plant production capacity table are color-coded to classify one or more different relationships between one or more different values of the automobile production solution.
